title: CI: use local registry
body:
CI VMs now include a local registry prepopulated with all
container images needed by tests.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Two flakes, both in what looks like network pulls ([dnf](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6508542952210432/logs/integration_test.log), [image pull from k8s.io](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/5945592998789120/logs/integration_test.log)). The k8s.io one is probably a good candidate for future caching.
[Podman PR](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/22726) has merged.  I'm considering this ready. @containers/buildah-maintainers PTAL.
ping, this code has been working well in podman. I'd like to get this merged so I can get working on the required treadmill changes (for vendoring into podman).
